title: Delhi court grants bail to 'The Skin Doctor' arrested for tweet against Priya Kapur
description: A Delhi court on Wednesday night granted bail to social media influencer 'The Skin Doctor', alias Dr Neelam Singh, in a case registered by the Delhi Police over his tweet against Priya Kapur, widow of late industrialist Sunjay Kapur. Judicial Magistrate Snehil Sharma of the Patiala House Court passed the order. According to lawyers present in the hearing, Singh was produced before the judge at around 9:40 PM and the bail order was passed an hour later. The Delhi Police had sought Singh's custody
